Document:
# Core Rule 8 - Base Raids
Base raids can only take place between warring factions, or between hostile factions if a strong justification is provided.
Base raids have to be approved by an administrator and overseen by at least one member of staff. Ahelp in game or open a support ticket to ask for raid permission, if approved please follow the rules below. Any rule can be bypassed if an administrator allows it.
## General
- The attacking and defending factions both have to be aware the raid is happening. - The defending team will have 10 to 15 minutes to set up defenses with staff assistance. - Both teams may receive a small amount of supplies to help in the raid depending on the circumstances.
## Participants
- Neither team should have over 3 more members than the other. Non-participating faction members should remain well outside the area of combat. - Neutral and allied factions can be enlisted but shouldn't outnumber participating faction members.
## Location
- Combat should remain within 2 screens of the defending faction's base. - Some factions have smaller bases than others, if a base is deemed too small to be properly raided the area may be extended and additional defenses will be set up. - While stumbling across a base raid is bound to happen, anyone who isn't on the attacking or defending team shouldn't be waiting around to take advantage of a raid. Third parties acting in bad faith may face administrative action.
